name: open-vide
description: A thin, glanceable HUD and control layer for developer/agent workflows on Even Realities G2
author: Open Vide

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: Connects to your self-hosted OpenVide daemon bridge, AI backends, and speech-to-text providers.

permissions.name: phone-microphone
permissions.desc: Captures voice input from the phone for chat prompts and speech-to-text.

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: Captures voice input from the glasses flow when supported by the device runtime.
